rulings.Case Title: ELEONOR SABALVARO et al VS. REYNALDO P RODRIGUEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Equitable Apportionment Of Referees Fees And Her Attorneys Fees Relating To Partition Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 23, 2016, line 1. PLAINTIFF ELEONOR SABALVARO, LORNA RODRIGUEZ WONG Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Equitable Apportionment Of Referees Fees And Her Attorneys Fees Relating To Partition Action is OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Defendant property objected. Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that opposition submitted in response to another motion may be considered opposition on the merits to this motion, shifting the burden to Defendant to show prejudice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELEONOR SABALVARO et al VS. REYNALDO P RODRIGUEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Equitable Apportionment Of Attorney Fees And Costs Relating To Partition Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 23, 2016, line 1. PLAINTIFF ELEONOR SABALVARO, LORNA RODRIGUEZ WONG Notice Of Motion And Motion For Equitable Apportionment Of Attorney Fees And Costs Relating To Partition Action is GRANTED. Plaintiff's reasonable attorney's fees in the amount of $190,101.47 are allocated to Defendant's share of the proceeds. CCP 874.040. Moving papers sufficiently support the request. Unauthorized supplemental declaration filed on September 12, 2016 is stricken. Plaintiff to prepare judgement reflecting the inclusive of the amounts awarded herein. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion &Amp; Motion To Amend Verified Complaint To Substitute True Name For Doe 10 Defendant

rulings.Case Title: DAVID JARAMILLO ET AL VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 23, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT BALWANTSINH THAKOR MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication is Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Triable issue of fact as to whether Plaintiffs were afforded their right to move back within a reasonable time under the circumstances of this case. Motion for Summary Adjudication is GRANTED as to non-tenant Plaintiffs, McCoy and Ezell. Motion for Summary Adjudication is otherwise DENIED for the same reasons as the Motion for Summary Adjudication and because plaintiff does not assert any claim for damages. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID JARAMILLO ET AL VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 23, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF DAVID JARAMILLO, ERIC BOICE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Of Issues is DENIED. Triable issue of fact as to whether Plaintiffs were afforded their right to move back within a reasonable time under the circumstances of this case. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT LORDAN VS. JOAN MCCUE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-552592 WITH CASE CGC-16-552591
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 23, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT CITYWIDE PROPERIES INC. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-552592 WITH CASE CGC-16-552591 is DENIED. The actions brought by the tenants of different units regarding habitability of their individual units do not present common questions of fact warranting consolidation. Such consolidation will be prejudicial to Plaintiffs. = (501/REQ)
